item.title:
Your AI Agent just got smarter with #Binance Wallet: Meet Agentic Wallet.
Let your AI trade, set li...
item.description:
Your AI Agent just got smarter with #Binance Wallet: Meet Agentic Wallet.
Let your AI trade, set limit orders, and manage your assets for you, all within your control.
Learn how 👉 https://t.co/ZtErD8wYqx https://t.co/QRfd8Gu6DK
--- @binance | ❤️ 11 | 🔁 1 | 💬 5 | 👁 454

item.title:
Kazakhstan is bringing crypto into everyday transactions!
Binance Kazakhstan and Alatau City Bank ...
item.description:
Kazakhstan is bringing crypto into everyday transactions!
Binance Kazakhstan and Alatau City Bank introduced a live crypto payment flow - presented directly to the President of Kazakhstan.
A simple use case: pay with digital assets, settle instantly in local currency.
This is what adoption looks like - where innovation meets regulation, and strong local partnerships drive real progress.
--- @binance | ❤️ 64 | 🔁 7 | 💬 29 | 👁 3135
item.author: @binance
